---
title: "Pheast_growthplate"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Loading in dataset

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)

# Find all h5 files
h5_files <- list.files(
  pattern = "\\.h5$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

h5_files
```

```{r}
seurat_list <- lapply(h5_files, function(f) {

  counts <- Read10X_h5(f)

  sample_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(
    basename(f)
  )

  obj <- CreateSeuratObject(
    counts = counts,
    project = sample_name
  )

  obj$sample_id <- sample_name

  obj
})
```

```{r}
bone_seurat <- merge(
  seurat_list[[1]],
  y = seurat_list[-1]
)

bone_seurat

```

QC:

```{r}

# =========================
# Chunk 1
# Metadata + pediatric dataset
# =========================

library(Seurat)
library(SeuratObject)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

# Rebuild metadata safely

bone_seurat$sample_id <- bone_seurat$orig.ident

bone_seurat$donor_id <- str_extract(
  bone_seurat$sample_id,
  "P[0-9]+"
)

bone_seurat$age_years <- case_when(
  bone_seurat$donor_id == "P30453" ~ 4,
  bone_seurat$donor_id == "P31011" ~ 7,
  bone_seurat$donor_id == "P25452" ~ 12,
  bone_seurat$donor_id == "P22202" ~ 16,
  bone_seurat$donor_id == "P27153" ~ 17,
  TRUE ~ NA_real_
)

# All donors already pediatric

bone_ped <- bone_seurat

cat(
  "Cell count before QC:",
  ncol(bone_ped),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Number of donors:",
  length(
    unique(
      bone_ped$donor_id
    )
  ),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "\nAges of donors:\n"
)

print(
  table(
    bone_ped$age_years
  )
)
```

#### QC:

```{r}
# =========================
# Chunk 2
# Growth plate QC
# =========================

library(Seurat)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)

# Add mitochondrial percentage
bone_ped[["percent.mito"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(
  bone_ped,
  pattern = "^MT-"
)

# Context-specific metadata
growthplate_qc_meta <- bone_ped@meta.data

# QC-passing cell names
growthplate_qc_cells <- rownames(growthplate_qc_meta)[
  growthplate_qc_meta$nFeature_RNA >= 200 &
    growthplate_qc_meta$nCount_RNA >= 500 &
    growthplate_qc_meta$percent.mito <= 20
]

cat(
  "Cell count before QC:",
  ncol(bone_ped),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Cell count after QC:",
  length(growthplate_qc_cells),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Cells removed during QC:",
  ncol(bone_ped) - length(growthplate_qc_cells),
  "\n"
)
```

#### Normalize:

```{r}
# =========================
# Chunk 3
# Growth plate marker normalization + marker-based cell labels
# Memory-safe
# =========================

library(Seurat)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

# Genes for heatmap + growth plate marker genes
growthplate_genes_to_use <- c(
  "CD24",
  "SIGLEC10",

  # Chondrocytes
  "ACAN",
  "COL2A1",
  "COL9A1",
  "COL10A1",
  "SOX9",
  "COMP",

  # MSCs / osteoblasts
  "COL1A1",
  "COL1A2",
  "RUNX2",
  "ALPL",
  "SPP1",
  "IBSP",
  "BGLAP",
  "SP7",

  # Myeloid lineage
  "LYZ",
  "LST1",
  "S100A8",
  "S100A9",
  "CD14",
  "FCGR3A",

  # T cells
  "CD3D",
  "CD3E",
  "TRAC",

  # NK cells
  "NKG7",
  "GNLY",
  "KLRD1",

  # Naive B cells
  "MS4A1",
  "CD79A",
  "CD79B",
  "CD74",
  "TCL1A",
  "IGHD",

  # Plasma cells
  "MZB1",
  "XBP1",
  "JCHAIN",
  "IGKC",

  # Endothelial cells
  "PECAM1",
  "VWF",
  "KDR",
  "CLDN5",

  # Vascular smooth muscle / pericytes
  "ACTA2",
  "TAGLN",
  "MYH11",
  "RGS5",
  "PDGFRB",

  # Plasmacytoid dendritic cells
  "IL3RA",
  "CLEC4C",
  "TCF4",
  "GZMB"
)

growthplate_genes_to_use <- unique(growthplate_genes_to_use)

# Count layers
growthplate_count_layers <- grep(
  "^counts",
  Layers(bone_ped[["RNA"]]),
  value = TRUE
)

if (length(growthplate_count_layers) == 0) {
  stop("No count layers found in bone_ped[['RNA']].")
}

# Normalize only marker genes for QC-passing cells
growthplate_expr_list <- lapply(
  growthplate_count_layers,
  function(layer_name) {

    cat("Processing layer:", layer_name, "\n")

    growthplate_counts <- GetAssayData(
      bone_ped,
      layer = layer_name
    )

    # Keep only QC-passing cells present in this layer
    growthplate_layer_cells <- intersect(
      colnames(growthplate_counts),
      growthplate_qc_cells
    )

    growthplate_counts <- growthplate_counts[
      ,
      growthplate_layer_cells,
      drop = FALSE
    ]

    # Empty layer protection
    if (ncol(growthplate_counts) == 0) {

      growthplate_empty <- Matrix(
        0,
        nrow = length(growthplate_genes_to_use),
        ncol = 0,
        sparse = TRUE
      )

      rownames(growthplate_empty) <- growthplate_genes_to_use

      return(growthplate_empty)
    }

    growthplate_out <- Matrix(
      0,
      nrow = length(growthplate_genes_to_use),
      ncol = ncol(growthplate_counts),
      sparse = TRUE
    )

    rownames(growthplate_out) <- growthplate_genes_to_use
    colnames(growthplate_out) <- colnames(growthplate_counts)

    growthplate_present_genes <- intersect(
      growthplate_genes_to_use,
      rownames(growthplate_counts)
    )

    if (length(growthplate_present_genes) > 0) {

      growthplate_sub_counts <- growthplate_counts[
        growthplate_present_genes,
        ,
        drop = FALSE
      ]

      growthplate_lib_size <- Matrix::colSums(growthplate_counts)
      growthplate_lib_size[growthplate_lib_size == 0] <- NA

      growthplate_norm <- t(
        t(growthplate_sub_counts) / growthplate_lib_size
      ) * 10000

      growthplate_norm <- log1p(growthplate_norm)
      growthplate_norm[is.na(growthplate_norm)] <- 0

      growthplate_out[growthplate_present_genes, ] <- growthplate_norm
    }

    growthplate_out
  }
)

growthplate_expr_marker <- do.call(
  cbind,
  growthplate_expr_list
)

growthplate_expr_marker <- as(
  growthplate_expr_marker,
  "dgCMatrix"
)

# Metadata for normalized cells
growthplate_meta <- bone_ped@meta.data

growthplate_meta <- growthplate_meta[
  colnames(growthplate_expr_marker),
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

# Make sure donor_id exists
if (!"donor_id" %in% colnames(growthplate_meta)) {

  growthplate_meta$sample_id <- growthplate_meta$orig.ident

  growthplate_meta$donor_id <- str_extract(
    growthplate_meta$sample_id,
    "P[0-9]+"
  )
}

# Marker scoring function
growthplate_marker_score <- function(genes) {

  present <- intersect(
    genes,
    rownames(growthplate_expr_marker)
  )

  if (length(present) == 0) {
    return(rep(0, ncol(growthplate_expr_marker)))
  }

  Matrix::colMeans(
    growthplate_expr_marker[
      present,
      ,
      drop = FALSE
    ]
  )
}

# Growth plate marker-based cell labels
growthplate_scores <- data.frame(
  Chondrocytes = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "ACAN", "COL2A1", "COL9A1", "COL10A1", "SOX9", "COMP"
  )),

  `Mesenchymal stem cells / osteoblasts` = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "COL1A1", "COL1A2", "RUNX2", "ALPL", "SPP1", "IBSP", "BGLAP", "SP7"
  )),

  `Myeloid lineage` = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "LYZ", "LST1", "S100A8", "S100A9", "CD14", "FCGR3A"
  )),

  `T cells` = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "CD3D", "CD3E", "TRAC"
  )),

  `NK cells` = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "NKG7", "GNLY", "KLRD1"
  )),

  `Naive B cells` = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "MS4A1", "CD79A", "CD79B", "CD74", "TCL1A", "IGHD"
  )),

  `Plasma cells` = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "MZB1", "XBP1", "JCHAIN", "IGKC"
  )),

  `Endothelial cells` = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "PECAM1", "VWF", "KDR", "CLDN5"
  )),

  `Vascular smooth muscle cells` = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "ACTA2", "TAGLN", "MYH11", "RGS5", "PDGFRB"
  )),

  `Plasmacytoid dendritic cells` = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "IL3RA", "CLEC4C", "TCF4", "GZMB"
  )),

  check.names = FALSE
)

growthplate_max_score <- apply(
  growthplate_scores,
  1,
  max,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

growthplate_cell_type <- colnames(growthplate_scores)[
  max.col(
    growthplate_scores,
    ties.method = "first"
  )
]

growthplate_cell_type[
  growthplate_max_score < 0.05
] <- "Other"

growthplate_meta$cell_type <- growthplate_cell_type

# Heatmap expression matrix
growthplate_expr_sub <- growthplate_expr_marker[
  c("CD24", "SIGLEC10"),
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

# Compatibility names for your existing heatmap chunks
expr_marker <- growthplate_expr_marker
expr_sub <- growthplate_expr_sub
meta_bone <- growthplate_meta

cat("\nGrowth plate cell type counts:\n")

print(
  sort(
    table(meta_bone$cell_type),
    decreasing = TRUE
  )
)

cat("\nExpression matrix for heatmaps:\n")
print(dim(expr_sub))
print(rownames(expr_sub))

cat("\nNormalization complete:\n")
cat("log1p(counts per 10k)\n")
```

```{r}
# Check metadata columns in the Seurat object

colnames(bone_seurat@meta.data)

grep(
  "cell|type|annot|label|cluster|class|identity|ident|lineage",
  colnames(bone_seurat@meta.data),
  value = TRUE,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)
```

#### Heat maps : \[ NO detailed cell types in this data set\]

```{r}
# =========================
# Growth plate marker-based cell type labels
# Memory-safe
# =========================

library(Seurat)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

# Make sure percent.mito exists
if (!"percent.mito" %in% colnames(bone_ped@meta.data)) {
  bone_ped[["percent.mito"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(
    bone_ped,
    pattern = "^MT-"
  )
}

# Context-specific QC metadata
growthplate_qc_meta <- bone_ped@meta.data

# QC-passing cell names
growthplate_qc_cells <- rownames(growthplate_qc_meta)[
  growthplate_qc_meta$nFeature_RNA >= 200 &
    growthplate_qc_meta$nCount_RNA >= 500 &
    growthplate_qc_meta$percent.mito <= 20
]

cat(
  "Growth plate cells before QC:",
  ncol(bone_ped),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Growth plate cells after QC:",
  length(growthplate_qc_cells),
  "\n"
)

# Heatmap genes + growth plate marker genes
growthplate_genes_to_use <- c(
  "CD24",
  "SIGLEC10",
  
  # Chondrocytes
  "ACAN",
  "COL2A1",
  "COL9A1",
  "COL10A1",
  "SOX9",
  "COMP",
  
  # Mesenchymal stem cells / osteoblasts
  "COL1A1",
  "COL1A2",
  "RUNX2",
  "ALPL",
  "SPP1",
  "IBSP",
  "BGLAP",
  "SP7",
  
  # Myeloid lineage
  "LYZ",
  "LST1",
  "S100A8",
  "S100A9",
  "CD14",
  "FCGR3A",
  
  # T cells
  "CD3D",
  "CD3E",
  "TRAC",
  
  # NK cells
  "NKG7",
  "GNLY",
  "KLRD1",
  
  # Naive B cells
  "MS4A1",
  "CD79A",
  "CD79B",
  "CD74",
  "TCL1A",
  "IGHD",
  
  # Plasma cells
  "MZB1",
  "XBP1",
  "JCHAIN",
  "IGKC",
  
  # Endothelial cells
  "PECAM1",
  "VWF",
  "KDR",
  "CLDN5",
  
  # Vascular smooth muscle / pericytes
  "ACTA2",
  "TAGLN",
  "MYH11",
  "RGS5",
  "PDGFRB",
  
  # Plasmacytoid dendritic cells
  "IL3RA",
  "CLEC4C",
  "TCF4",
  "GZMB"
)

growthplate_genes_to_use <- unique(growthplate_genes_to_use)

growthplate_count_layers <- grep(
  "^counts",
  Layers(bone_ped[["RNA"]]),
  value = TRUE
)

growthplate_expr_list <- lapply(
  growthplate_count_layers,
  function(layer_name) {
    
    cat("Processing layer:", layer_name, "\n")
    
    growthplate_counts <- GetAssayData(
      bone_ped,
      layer = layer_name
    )
    
    # Keep only QC-passing cells present in this layer
    growthplate_layer_cells <- intersect(
      colnames(growthplate_counts),
      growthplate_qc_cells
    )
    
    growthplate_counts <- growthplate_counts[
      ,
      growthplate_layer_cells,
      drop = FALSE
    ]
    
    if (ncol(growthplate_counts) == 0) {
      
      growthplate_empty <- Matrix(
        0,
        nrow = length(growthplate_genes_to_use),
        ncol = 0,
        sparse = TRUE
      )
      
      rownames(growthplate_empty) <- growthplate_genes_to_use
      
      return(growthplate_empty)
    }
    
    growthplate_out <- Matrix(
      0,
      nrow = length(growthplate_genes_to_use),
      ncol = ncol(growthplate_counts),
      sparse = TRUE
    )
    
    rownames(growthplate_out) <- growthplate_genes_to_use
    colnames(growthplate_out) <- colnames(growthplate_counts)
    
    growthplate_present_genes <- intersect(
      growthplate_genes_to_use,
      rownames(growthplate_counts)
    )
    
    if (length(growthplate_present_genes) > 0) {
      
      growthplate_sub_counts <- growthplate_counts[
        growthplate_present_genes,
        ,
        drop = FALSE
      ]
      
      growthplate_lib_size <- Matrix::colSums(growthplate_counts)
      growthplate_lib_size[growthplate_lib_size == 0] <- NA
      
      growthplate_norm <- t(
        t(growthplate_sub_counts) / growthplate_lib_size
      ) * 10000
      
      growthplate_norm <- log1p(growthplate_norm)
      growthplate_norm[is.na(growthplate_norm)] <- 0
      
      growthplate_out[growthplate_present_genes, ] <- growthplate_norm
    }
    
    growthplate_out
  }
)

growthplate_expr_marker <- do.call(
  cbind,
  growthplate_expr_list
)

growthplate_expr_marker <- as(
  growthplate_expr_marker,
  "dgCMatrix"
)

# Context-specific metadata for normalized cells
growthplate_meta <- bone_ped@meta.data

growthplate_meta <- growthplate_meta[
  colnames(growthplate_expr_marker),
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

if (!"donor_id" %in% colnames(growthplate_meta)) {
  growthplate_meta$sample_id <- growthplate_meta$orig.ident
  
  growthplate_meta$donor_id <- str_extract(
    growthplate_meta$sample_id,
    "P[0-9]+"
  )
}

growthplate_marker_score <- function(genes) {
  
  present <- intersect(
    genes,
    rownames(growthplate_expr_marker)
  )
  
  if (length(present) == 0) {
    return(rep(0, ncol(growthplate_expr_marker)))
  }
  
  Matrix::colMeans(
    growthplate_expr_marker[
      present,
      ,
      drop = FALSE
    ]
  )
}

growthplate_scores <- data.frame(
  Chondrocytes = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "ACAN", "COL2A1", "COL9A1", "COL10A1", "SOX9", "COMP"
  )),
  
  `Mesenchymal stem cells / osteoblasts` = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "COL1A1", "COL1A2", "RUNX2", "ALPL", "SPP1", "IBSP", "BGLAP", "SP7"
  )),
  
  `Myeloid lineage` = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "LYZ", "LST1", "S100A8", "S100A9", "CD14", "FCGR3A"
  )),
  
  `T cells` = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "CD3D", "CD3E", "TRAC"
  )),
  
  `NK cells` = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "NKG7", "GNLY", "KLRD1"
  )),
  
  `Naive B cells` = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "MS4A1", "CD79A", "CD79B", "CD74", "TCL1A", "IGHD"
  )),
  
  `Plasma cells` = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "MZB1", "XBP1", "JCHAIN", "IGKC"
  )),
  
  `Endothelial cells` = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "PECAM1", "VWF", "KDR", "CLDN5"
  )),
  
  `Vascular smooth muscle cells` = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "ACTA2", "TAGLN", "MYH11", "RGS5", "PDGFRB"
  )),
  
  `Plasmacytoid dendritic cells` = growthplate_marker_score(c(
    "IL3RA", "CLEC4C", "TCF4", "GZMB"
  )),
  
  check.names = FALSE
)

growthplate_max_score <- apply(
  growthplate_scores,
  1,
  max,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

growthplate_assigned_cell_type <- colnames(growthplate_scores)[
  max.col(
    growthplate_scores,
    ties.method = "first"
  )
]

growthplate_assigned_cell_type[
  growthplate_max_score < 0.05
] <- "Other"

growthplate_meta$cell_type <- growthplate_assigned_cell_type

cat("Growth plate cell type counts:\n")

print(
  sort(
    table(growthplate_meta$cell_type),
    decreasing = TRUE
  )
)

growthplate_expr_sub <- growthplate_expr_marker[
  c("CD24", "SIGLEC10"),
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

# Compatibility names for your existing heatmap chunks
expr_marker <- growthplate_expr_marker
expr_sub <- growthplate_expr_sub
meta_bone <- growthplate_meta

cat("\nExpression matrix for heatmap:\n")
print(dim(expr_sub))
print(rownames(expr_sub))

cat("\nNormalization complete:\n")
cat("Mean expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)")
```

#### Horizontal Long:

```{r}
# Horizontal Long Heatmap
# Growth plate marker-based labels
# CD24 + SIGLEC10

library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10")

# Use already-created normalized expression matrix
expr_hm <- expr_sub[
  genes_to_plot,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

# Match metadata to expression matrix cells
meta_hm <- meta_bone[
  colnames(expr_hm),
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

# Keep valid cell labels
keep_valid <- !is.na(meta_hm$cell_type) &
              meta_hm$cell_type != ""

meta_hm <- meta_hm[
  keep_valid,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

expr_hm <- expr_hm[
  ,
  keep_valid,
  drop = FALSE
]

# Growth plate cell type order
cell_type_order <- c(
  "Chondrocytes",
  "Mesenchymal stem cells / osteoblasts",
  "Endothelial cells",
  "Vascular smooth muscle cells",
  "Myeloid lineage",
  "Plasmacytoid dendritic cells",
  "T cells",
  "NK cells",
  "Naive B cells",
  "Plasma cells",
  "Other"
)

cell_types <- cell_type_order[
  cell_type_order %in% unique(meta_hm$cell_type)
]

# Average expression by cell type
avg_mat <- sapply(
  cell_types,
  function(ct) {
    cols <- which(meta_hm$cell_type == ct)

    Matrix::rowMeans(
      expr_hm[
        ,
        cols,
        drop = FALSE
      ]
    )
  }
)

avg_mat <- as.matrix(avg_mat)

# Donor and cell counts
label_df <- meta_hm %>%
  group_by(cell_type) %>%
  summarise(
    d = n_distinct(donor_id),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

label_df <- label_df[
  match(
    cell_types,
    label_df$cell_type
  ),
]

# Long labels on x-axis
colnames(avg_mat) <- paste0(
  label_df$cell_type,
  " (d=",
  label_df$d,
  ", n=",
  label_df$n,
  ")"
)

# Color scale
legend_min <- 0

legend_max <- as.numeric(
  quantile(
    avg_mat,
    probs = 0.99,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

legend_mid <- legend_max / 2

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(
    legend_min,
    legend_mid,
    legend_max
  ),
  c(
    "#2166AC",
    "#D0D0D0",
    "#B2182B"
  )
)

# Heatmap
ht <- Heatmap(
  avg_mat,

  name = "Mean expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)",

  col = col_fun,

  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,

  rect_gp = gpar(
    col = "white",
    lwd = 1
  ),

  row_names_side = "left",

  row_names_gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 16,
    fontface = "bold"
  ),

  column_names_side = "bottom",

  column_names_rot = 90,

  column_names_gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 13,
    fontface = "bold"
  ),

  width = unit(
    40,
    "cm"
  ),

  height = unit(
    7,
    "cm"
  ),

  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title_gp = gpar(
      fontsize = 15,
      fontface = "bold"
    ),
    labels_gp = gpar(
      fontsize = 13,
      fontface = "bold"
    )
  ),

  cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
    val <- avg_mat[i, j]

    lab <- if (val < 0.005) {
      "0"
    } else {
      sprintf("%.3f", val)
    }

    grid.text(
      lab,
      x,
      y,
      gp = gpar(
        fontsize = 9,
        fontface = "bold",
        col = "black"
      )
    )
  }
)

grid.newpage()

draw(
  ht,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right",
  padding = unit(c(10, 30, 30, 30), "mm")
)

png(
  "growthplate_CD24_SIGLEC10_horizontal_long_celltype_heatmap_presentation.png",
  width = 9000,
  height = 3800,
  res = 300
)

grid.newpage()

draw(
  ht,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right",
  padding = unit(c(10, 30, 30, 30), "mm")
)

dev.off()
```

#### Vertical long:

```{r}
# Vertical Long Heatmap
# Growth plate marker-based labels
# CD24 + SIGLEC10

library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10")

# Use already-created normalized expression matrix
expr_hm <- expr_sub[
  genes_to_plot,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

# Match metadata to expression matrix cells
meta_hm <- meta_bone[
  colnames(expr_hm),
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

# Keep valid cell labels
keep_valid <- !is.na(meta_hm$cell_type) &
              meta_hm$cell_type != ""

meta_hm <- meta_hm[
  keep_valid,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

expr_hm <- expr_hm[
  ,
  keep_valid,
  drop = FALSE
]

# Growth plate cell type order
cell_type_order <- c(
  "Chondrocytes",
  "Mesenchymal stem cells / osteoblasts",
  "Endothelial cells",
  "Vascular smooth muscle cells",
  "Myeloid lineage",
  "Plasmacytoid dendritic cells",
  "T cells",
  "NK cells",
  "Naive B cells",
  "Plasma cells",
  "Other"
)

cell_types <- cell_type_order[
  cell_type_order %in% unique(meta_hm$cell_type)
]

# Average expression by cell type
avg_mat <- sapply(
  cell_types,
  function(ct) {
    cols <- which(meta_hm$cell_type == ct)

    Matrix::rowMeans(
      expr_hm[
        ,
        cols,
        drop = FALSE
      ]
    )
  }
)

avg_mat <- as.matrix(avg_mat)

# Donor and cell counts
label_df <- meta_hm %>%
  group_by(cell_type) %>%
  summarise(
    d = n_distinct(donor_id),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

label_df <- label_df[
  match(
    cell_types,
    label_df$cell_type
  ),
]

# Long labels first
colnames(avg_mat) <- paste0(
  label_df$cell_type,
  " (d=",
  label_df$d,
  ", n=",
  label_df$n,
  ")"
)

# Make vertical layout
heatmap_mat <- t(avg_mat)

# Color scale
legend_min <- 0

legend_max <- as.numeric(
  quantile(
    heatmap_mat,
    probs = 0.99,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

legend_mid <- legend_max / 2

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(
    legend_min,
    legend_mid,
    legend_max
  ),
  c(
    "#2166AC",
    "#D0D0D0",
    "#B2182B"
  )
)

# Heatmap
ht <- Heatmap(
  heatmap_mat,

  name = "Mean expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)",

  col = col_fun,

  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,

  rect_gp = gpar(
    col = "white",
    lwd = 1
  ),

  row_names_side = "left",

  row_names_gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 13,
    fontface = "bold"
  ),

  row_names_max_width = unit(
    18,
    "cm"
  ),

  column_names_side = "bottom",

  column_names_rot = 45,

  column_names_gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 16,
    fontface = "bold"
  ),

  width = unit(
    5,
    "cm"
  ),

  height = unit(
    22,
    "cm"
  ),

  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title_gp = gpar(
      fontsize = 15,
      fontface = "bold"
    ),
    labels_gp = gpar(
      fontsize = 13,
      fontface = "bold"
    )
  ),

  cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
    val <- heatmap_mat[i, j]

    lab <- if (val < 0.005) {
      "0"
    } else {
      sprintf("%.4f", val)
    }

    grid.text(
      lab,
      x,
      y,
      gp = gpar(
        fontsize = 9,
        fontface = "bold",
        col = "black"
      )
    )
  }
)

grid.newpage()

draw(
  ht,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right",
  padding = unit(c(10, 30, 20, 30), "mm")
)

png(
  "growthplate_CD24_SIGLEC10_vertical_long_celltype_heatmap_presentation.png",
  width = 3600,
  height = 5200,
  res = 300
)

grid.newpage()

draw(
  ht,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right",
  padding = unit(c(10, 30, 20, 30), "mm")
)

dev.off()
```
